  "findings": [
    "Trip hazards from cords routed across active walkways",
    "Missing guardrails on elevated work platforms",
    "Blocked emergency egress routes and fire extinguishers",
    "Use of unsafe, improvised scaffolds",
    "Unattended and unguarded open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately in the affected areas",
    "Reroute or cover cords with heavy-duty cord protectors",
    "Install compliant guardrails or personal fall arrest systems",
    "Clear all blockages from egress paths and fire extinguishers",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and replace with certified platforms",
    "Cover and secure, or guard with standard railings, all open floor holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The active production floor contains multiple critical safety violations including fall hazards, trip hazards, blocked emergency equipment, and non-compliant access equipment that present an immediate danger to life and health (IDLH).",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1910.22 (General Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1910.28 (Fall Protection)"
  ]
}
